summary: Comprehensive testing of multi-product e-commerce platform transformation. All 21 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Products, combos, cart, coupons, admin product management, and Meta Pixel tracking all working correctly.

issues: Product images are empty arrays - showing placeholder icons instead of actual product images. This is expected per requirements but may need real images for production.

critical_code_review_comments: Meta Pixel (fbq) is properly integrated - ViewContent fires on product detail page, AddToCart fires when adding to cart
Cart uses sessionStorage correctly for persistence
Products are seeded on backend startup with correct MRP prices
Admin product management has all 4 tabs: Products, Combos, Coupons, Site Settings

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, all interactions work)

seed_data_creation: Products and combos are seeded automatically on backend startup via seed_products() function in routes/products.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-product e-commerce platform fully functional. 5 products (Serum, Night Cream, Under Eye Cream, Sunscreen, Cleanser) with correct MRP prices. 3 combo bundles. Cart validation, coupon system, and admin product management all working. Meta Pixel tracking verified.

backend_tests.POST /api/cart/validate: PASS - Validates products and combos, calculates totals
backend_tests.GET /api/site-settings: PASS - Returns hero title and settings
backend_tests.PUT /api/admin/products/{slug}: PASS - Updates product with admin token
backend_tests.POST /api/admin/coupons: PASS - Creates coupon with admin token
backend_tests.POST /api/orders: PASS - Creates order with items array

frontend_tests.Homepage products: PASS - Shows 5 product cards with Add to Cart buttons
frontend_tests.Shop page: PASS - Shows all products and combos
frontend_tests.Product detail /product/anti-aging-serum: PASS - Shows MRP ₹1699, prepaid ₹999, benefits, Add to Cart, Buy Now
frontend_tests.Cart page: PASS - Shows cart items, payment method selector, coupon input, upsell products, order summary
frontend_tests.Add to Cart flow: PASS - Items added to cart via sessionStorage
frontend_tests.Admin /admin/products: PASS - Shows Product Management with 5 products, tabs for Combos/Coupons/Settings
frontend_tests.Meta Pixel AddToCart: PASS - fbq('track', 'AddToCart') fires when adding product
frontend_tests.Meta Pixel ViewContent: PASS - fbq('track', 'ViewContent') fires on product detail page
